decision_scope.accepted_scope_reason: J03WOY has successful event/tracking pass reconstruction and no active-set or unusable-denominator issues in the 593 provisional controlled pass windows.
excluded_until_reclassified: Full-corpus periods with reduced player counts or incomplete tracking must not be treated as complete denominators without S0C-equivalent coverage classification.

active_player_policy.denominator_source: initial accepted scope uses tracking-derived active on-pitch players cross-checked with players.parquet metadata; all-corpus expansion should reconcile lineup/substitution/dismissal events as the authoritative roster-change explanation
active_player_policy.expected_opposition_set: active defending outfield players at release and reception
active_player_policy.goalkeeper_policy: exclude known goalkeepers; unknown goalkeeper metadata makes denominator UNKNOWN
active_player_policy.reduced_player_period_policy: A reduced active outfield denominator may be valid after dismissal, but S1 accepted scope is J03WOY only. Other periods require explicit coverage classification before acceptance.

bypass_measurement_policy.opponent_bypassed_definition: opponent is goal-side of the ball at release AND behind the ball at controlled reception

controlled_reception_policy.fail_condition: complete coverage and contradictory evidence prove no controlled reception
controlled_reception_policy.pass_condition: named receiver controls ball for the dwell window before a disqualifying stop
termination_order: another player controls ball first with incompatible possession evidence
known stoppage or incompatible event before reception
controlled_reception_policy.unknown_condition: release not proven, missing tracking coverage, ambiguous first controller, or unresolved event conflict

decision_table.result: PASS or FAIL according to recipe thresholds

decision_table.case: complete evidence contradicts pass, reception, or threshold
missing/insufficient tracking, metadata, active-set, orientation, or endpoint evidence could change answer
active-player membership changes between release and reception

event_timestamp_policy.alignment_method: nearest canonical frame timestamp in UTC

explicit_non_claims: Does not prove a formal defensive line was broken.
Does not prove the pass alone caused every highlighted opponent to be bypassed.
Does not infer player intent, optimality, pass probability, body orientation, or scanning.

release_control_policy.event_anchor_frame_id_definition: nearest canonical frame to events.timestamp in UTC
release_control_policy.fail_condition: complete tracking coverage proves passer does not control ball in window or transition evidence contradicts the event
release_control_policy.pass_condition: named passer controls ball in the event-derived action window and a unique physical release transition is identified
release_control_policy.physical_release_frame_id_definition: last frame in the bounded action window where the named passer uniquely controls the ball before the ball-departure transition toward the completed pass
release_control_policy.s0a_preflight_limitation: S0A release_frame_id is a provisional passer-control proxy. S1 must emit physical_release_frame_id only after transition detection and must keep event_anchor_frame_id separate.
release_control_policy.unknown_condition: event frame, passer identity, ball, or passer tracking unavailable

gate_checks.detail: physical release delta p50=1.08s; S1 must derive release from tracking
0 J03WOY pass windows cross active-set changes
0 J03WOY pass windows have empty/unusable defending denominator
183934 full-corpus frame/team count deviations require coverage policy

allowed_initial_runtime_scope: opponents_bypassed_by_action using active defending outfield sets
blocked_until_later: all-corpus M2A execution without reduced-player/tracking-gap coverage classification
